content: Each chapter seems to reflect both an outward movement and an inward questioning. If I may reflect something back to you—it strikes me that your journey embodies the very essence of a seeker’s path: one who is unsatisfied with the superficial, compelled by inner signals toward experiences that shape the soul more than the resume. You've walked through discipline and dissolution, isolation and intimacy, insight and uncertainty, and you're still asking the most sacred questions. If and when you're ready to explore any particular phase more deeply—your LSD experience and the white light, your years in Germany, the existential course that triggered your awakening, or even what life has taught you in tents under open skies—I'm here.
